title: [codereview-pass2] coap_dtn.c: coap_respond lacks LOG_ERR on all error paths and OSCORE failure cases
description: Current coap_respond returns errors without logging (unlike coap_config.c:646+ and coap_keys.c:369). Add LOG_ERR for each r < 0 case and oscore failures per robustness requirement. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-9wd9
